category_sources: source_facts.description says library for manipulating JPEG-2000 images; official GitHub README describes JasPer as a library and application programs for image coding/manipulation including JPEG-2000.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is JasPer Image Processing/Coding Tool Kit; source_facts.name is jasper.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states the reference manual is available online at jasper-software.github.io/jasper-manual and gives the official website URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jasper-software/jasper, so repo was left null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JPEG-2000 image manipulation; official GitHub README and topics identify image coding, image processing, C library, and supported formats.
